title: Fix PRD section numbering, player/view counts, agent counts across all docs
description: Audit and fix all documentation for stale or incorrect counts. PRD section numbering must be sequential. Player count, view count, and agent count references must match current reality. Cross-check PRD, CONSTITUTION, AGENT_PLAYBOOK, and CLAUDE.md for consistency. Update any references to old sprint numbers or outdated metrics.

florentino_gate.reason: Documentation accuracy is critical for a paid artifact. Stale counts erode credibility.

build.notes: 22 subsection headers renumbered in PRD (4.x→6.x, 5.x→7.x, 7.x→9.x, 8.x→11.x, 9.x→12.x). Analytics views count fixed: 43→163 (103 dual-scope). Duplicate data table removed. Agent Playbook: 12→14 agents (3 references). System health score: 81.5→92.0 (3 references in Playbook).

domain_sanity.notes: Jose Mourinho: YES — counts now match source of truth (analytics_ipl.py, config/agents/). Andy Flower: YES — PRD accurately reflects the cricket data scale. Pep Guardiola: YES — no structural contradictions remain between PRD, Constitution, and Playbook.

enforcement.notes: Tom Brady: Surgical edits only — no prose rewriting. Scope respected. All cross-references verified.

system_check.notes: N'Golo Kante: Documentation integrity restored. No schema or code changes. Data counts verified against live system.

post_task_note.what_changed: PRD section numbering made sequential (22 subsections fixed). Analytics views count corrected from 43 to 163 (103 dual-scope). Agent Playbook agent count corrected from 12 to 14. System health score references updated from 81.5 to 92.0. Duplicate data table removed from PRD.
post_task_note.assumption_tested: Documentation drift happens silently — confirmed. PRD was 3 major numbering sections behind, view count was off by 120.
post_task_note.usp: Accurate documentation builds trust in the paid artifact. A magazine that can't count its own analytics views loses credibility.

2026-02-28T00:00:00Z.detail: Audited PRD v3.0.0 and Agent Playbook v1.0.0. Fixed all numbering, count, and metric discrepancies. Surgical edits only — no prose changes.

2026-02-28T01:00:00Z.detail: All gates passed. Cross-references verified between PRD, Constitution, Playbook, and CLAUDE.md. Board updated.
